---
title: "envelopeChange()"
description: "Wrap a raw change payload in a D82 storage envelope."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Wrap a raw change payload in a D82 storage envelope.

## Import

```ts
import { envelopeChange } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function envelopeChange(
	change: T,
	opts: ChangeEnvelopeOptions,
): ChangeEnvelope<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `change` | `T` | change value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `ChangeEnvelopeOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ChangeEnvelope<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { envelopeChange } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/change.ts`
